headline: The AI Supercycle Needs More Than Just Chips. This Growth Stock Builds the Network That Connects Them.
summary: Arista Networks is the non-chip AI play you're looking for.

headline: Arista Networks (ANET) Stock May Be Above Fair Value As AI Networking Launches
summary: Arista Networks stock has delivered a very large 5 year return while current valuation checks send a cooler message, with the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) estimate sitting close to the market price and earnings based multiples pointing to a premium. Over 5 years, Arista Networks has returned roughly 7x an initial investment, which sets a high bar for any further upside to be justified. New AI focused networking launches such as the 7060XE7 Series can support expectations for future cash flows,...
